themes.name: [Negative] Trading Issues, App Crashes, and Poor Experience

quotes.text: Don't use Groww for active trading or options. It's okay for long-term investment or just monitoring stocks, but for execution, it is very unreliable.
The app lags almost 100% of the time during live trades, and the data is often inaccurate.
Using it for trading is a sure way to lose your money due to technical errors.
Groww app ver bad experience.

themes.description: Users consistently report various issues with trading, including lagging, inaccurate data, and unreliability, resulting in financial losses. Additionally, some users experience app crashes, poor performance, and unresponsive customer support, leading to frustration and a negative experience.
themes.business_impact: Substantial financial losses, reputational damage, and high churn rate due to unreliable trading and poor app performance, ultimately impacting the company's revenue and market share.
themes.root_cause_hypothesis: Insufficient infrastructure and bandwidth to handle the increasing volume of trades, coupled with inadequate quality assurance testing and delayed patches, contributing to the reliability issues.
themes.action_plan:
• Invest in scalable infrastructure and bandwidth to support high-traffic periods
• Implement robust quality assurance testing to identify and fix issues before they reach production
• Develop and deploy patches to resolve outstanding problems
• Enhance customer support to address user concerns promptly and professionally
• Conduct regular app performance monitoring and analysis to identify areas for improvement and optimize the user experience.
